# Tatva by Tradeprop
Premium luxury plots and signature villas near Nal Sarovar, Sanand, Gujarat.

## Project Details
- **Location**: Sanand-Nal Sarovar Road, Gujarat, India.
- **Distance**: 8 km from Nal Sarovar Bird Sanctuary.
- **Offerings**: NA/NOC title-clear residential plots and luxury signature villas.
- **Pricing**: Plots starting from ₹11 Lakhs, Villas from ₹35 Lakhs.
- **Amenities**: 5-Star Club Resort, Olympic Swimming Pool, Gym & Spa, Fine Dining, Event Hall.
